title: GrowSF mayor guide sample
text:
Sample GrowSF Mayor Guide
Sample San Francisco mayor recommendations
This committed fixture is representative only. It is not a real 2026 recommendation, rating, or voter-guide claim.
Sample priorities
The guide text highlights housing abundance, safer streets, reliable public transportation, accountable city operations, and transparent budgeting.
In this sample, Candidate A receives a placeholder positive description for permitting reform and public dashboard commitments.
In this sample, Candidate B receives a placeholder mixed description for fiscal oversight and a slower approach to housing production.
Readers are instructed to compare official voter pamphlet statements, candidate websites, public finance records, and debate transcripts.
